flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Eastern Florida State College rose 14% between 2017 and 2020 ($10.7k → $12.2k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Eastern Florida State College fell 14% between 2009 and 2012 (73.4% → 63.3%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Eastern Florida State College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Eastern Florida State College rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 (44.9% → 52.1%).
